name: Ehukai Pillbox (Sunset)
tagline: Watch pros surf Pipeline from a WWII bunker on the ridge — short, steep, and spectacular.
parking: Street parking on Ke Nui Rd near Sunset Elementary
bestTime: Golden hour / sunset for best light; winter mornings to watch Pipeline surf from above
insiderTips: Short but steep — about 15-20 minutes up. Two pillboxes; the second one at the summit has the best panoramic view. In winter you can watch the Pipe Masters competition from up here — bring binoculars. The trailhead is behind Sunset Elementary School.
